analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e language for class features.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, precise, and covers all mechanical aspects of the feature.

mechanics.trigger: On the first attack on the player's turn.
mechanics.effect: Grants Advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls using Strength for the current turn.
mechanics.drawback: Attacks against the user gain Advantage until the start of the user's next turn.

analysis.notes: This is a core, foundational feature for the Barbarian class. The mechanics are simple but highly impactful, defining the Barbarian's primary combat style (trading defense for offense).
